name: ALBEMARLE CORP
business: Albemarle Corporation is a world leader in transforming essential resources into critical ingredients for mobility, energy, connectivity, and health. The company operates three reportable segments: Energy Storage (lithium compounds for batteries), Specialties (bromine and lithium specialties), and Ketjen (refining catalysts, being divested). It serves approximately 1,900 customers in approximately 70 countries across end markets including grid storage, automotive, aerospace, conventional energy, electronics, construction, agriculture, pharmaceuticals, and medical devices.

exposures.sentence: The end markets we serve include grid storage, automotive, aerospace, conventional energy, electronics, construction, agriculture and food, pharmaceuticals and medical devices.

Lithium is a key component in products and processes used in a variety of applications and industries, which include lithium batteries used in consumer electronics and electric vehicles, power grids and solar panels, high performance greases and specialty glass used in consumer appliances and electronics, among other applications.

We offer a wide range of HPC products, which are applied throughout the oil refining industry.
Our business and operations could suffer in the event of cybersecurity breaches, information technology system failures, or network disruptions.
Integration of AI technologies into our operations may introduce new risks, require significant additional investment, and materially impact our competitive position if unsuccessful.

catalysts.event: Divestiture of controlling interest in Ketjen Refining Solutions business to ChemCat AcquisitionCo, LLC
catalysts.sentence: On October 25, 2025, the Company signed a definitive agreement to divest the controlling ownership interest of Ketjen s Refining Solutions business to ChemCat AcquisitionCo, LLC and contribute the remaining ownership interest to ChemCat Holdings, LP, a newly formed limited partnership (Holdco).

catalysts.event: Sale of 50% ownership interest in Eurecat S.A. to Axens SA
catalysts.sentence: On January 23, 2026, the Company completed the sale of its 50% ownership interest in Eurecat S.A., a joint venture included in the Ketjen segment, to Axens SA.

catalysts.event: Decision to place Kemerton Train 1 into care and maintenance
catalysts.sentence: In addition, in February 2026, we announced the decision to put Kemerton Train 1 into care and maintenance.
